policy_statement: The City of Dakar commits to reduce its greenhouse gas emissions by 25% by 2030 and by 54% by 2050 below the Business-as-Usual (BAU) trajectory through implementation of ambitious actions in the PCET.
verbatim_text: According to the assumptions defined, the implementation  of  ambitious  actions  will reduce  future  GHG  emissions  by  25%  in 2030, 36% in 2040 and 54% in 2050 below the BAU projections.
has_quantifiable_target: Yes. Reduce future GHG emissions by 25% in 2030 and 54% in 2050 below BAU projections (also 36% in 2040 noted).
has_binding_mechanism: No. This is a municipal target in the PCET (ambitious scenario) rather than an explicitly enacted law or regulation in the quoted text.
has_spatial_specificity: Yes. City of Dakar (territorial scope covered by the PCET).
extraction_rationale: Clear quantified mitigation targets stated by the City in the PCET and in the GHG scenarios (explicit percentages and years). Meets the QUANTIFIABLE TARGET criterion.
weak_signals: "ambitious actions"; "commit"; "according to the assumptions defined" (vague/aspirational implementation language)
strong_signals: 25% by 2030; 36% by 2040; 54% by 2050; "below BAU projections"; "City of Dakar"; "PCET" (territorial plan)

policy_statement: The City of Dakar targets increasing the share of renewable energy in the city's energy mix to at least 65% by 2050.
verbatim_text:
The GHG reduction targets for the energy sector's  main  sources  of  emissions  are presented below:
- Increase the share of renewable energy in the energy mix to at least 65% by 2050
has_quantifiable_target: Yes. Increase the share of renewable energy in the energy mix to at least 65% by 2050.
has_binding_mechanism: No. The text sets a target for the city's energy mix; no legal instrument is cited in the quoted lines.
has_spatial_specificity: Yes. City of Dakar / Dakar energy mix (territorial energy mix targets).
extraction_rationale: Explicit quantified target for the energy mix (renewable share) in the energy sector—meets QUANTIFIABLE TARGET criterion and is a named sectoral mitigation target.
weak_signals: No binding/enforcement language; no baseline provided; no interim targets/milestones; no implementation or responsible authority specified
strong_signals: "65%"; "by 2050"; "increase the share of renewable energy"; "energy mix"; "City of Dakar"

policy_statement: The City of Dakar aims to reduce the energy bill of its built heritage by 75% by 2050 through energy efficiency and renewable measures.
has_quantifiable_target: Yes. 75% reduction in the energy bill in the built heritage of the City of Dakar by 2050.
has_binding_mechanism: No. This is a municipal goal within the PCET rather than a cited legal mandate.
has_spatial_specificity: Yes. Applies to the built heritage managed by the City of Dakar (municipal buildings/public lighting).
extraction_rationale: Explicit quantified financial/energy saving target for municipal built heritage—meets QUANTIFIABLE TARGET and RESOURCE ALLOCATION relevance for municipal operations.
weak_signals: "aims", "could achieve", aspirational language, no cited legal mandate, no baseline, no interim milestones
strong_signals: "75% reduction", "by 2050", "built heritage of the City of Dakar", "energy efficiency", "renewable measures"

policy_statement: The City of Dakar will replace street lighting to increase the share of LED and solar-LED lamps to 75% of total street lighting by 2050.
verbatim_text:
Efficiency in public lighting
- Increase the share of LEDs to 75% of total street lighting lamps by 2050.
has_quantifiable_target: Yes. Increase the share of LEDs to 75% of total street lighting lamps by 2050 (also other LED targets for buildings noted elsewhere).
has_binding_mechanism: No. The PCET sets a target; the quoted text does not cite an enacted regulation.
has_spatial_specificity: Yes. City of Dakar street lighting.
extraction_rationale: Explicit, quantified target for public lighting technology deployment (LED share) — meets QUANTIFIABLE TARGET and SPECIFIC INTERVENTION (LED replacement) criteria.
weak_signals: increase, will replace, no cited regulation, no baseline/interim targets
strong_signals: 75%, by 2050, LED, solar-LED, street lighting, City of Dakar, "share of total street lighting"

policy_statement: The City of Dakar will increase urban green spaces by 150 hectares by 2030 to strengthen resilience and improve the living environment.
verbatim_text:
The objectives set are as follows:
- Increase urban green spaces by 150 ha in Dakar by 2030
has_quantifiable_target: Yes. Increase urban green spaces by 150 ha in Dakar by 2030.
has_binding_mechanism: No. It is an objective in the PCET action plan; no specific legal instrument is referenced.
has_spatial_specificity: Yes. City of Dakar (urban green spaces).
extraction_rationale: Explicit adaptation target expressed as a quantified increase in green space—meets QUANTIFIABLE TARGET and SPECIFIC INTERVENTION (green space increase) criteria.
weak_signals: strengthen, improve, objective, action plan, resilience, no baseline, no legal/regulatory backing
strong_signals: 150 ha, by 2030, Dakar, increase urban green spaces, numeric target, timeline, spatial specificity

policy_statement: The City of Dakar aims to compost 50% of organic waste and 30% of garden waste by 2050 as part of a circular economy approach.
verbatim_text:
The targets for each of the waste sector's main sources of emissions are:
- Composting
- 50% of organic waste and 30% of garden waste will be composted by 2050.
has_quantifiable_target: Yes. 50% of organic waste and 30% of garden waste will be composted by 2050.
has_binding_mechanism: No. Targets are set by the PCET; no binding regulatory mechanism is cited in the quoted lines.
has_spatial_specificity: Yes. City of Dakar (waste generated in the city).
extraction_rationale: Explicit quantified waste-sector targets for composting percentages—meets QUANTIFIABLE TARGET and SPECIFIC INTERVENTION (organic waste recovery) criteria.
weak_signals: "aims to", "as part of", "circular economy", no baseline, no binding mechanism, long-horizon (2050) without interim milestones

policy_statement: The City of Dakar targets that 32% of wastewater treatment be accomplished via activated sludge processes by 2050.
verbatim_text:
Wastewater treatment
-  32%  of  wastewater  treatment  by  2050 will  be  done  through  the  treatment  of activated sludge.
has_quantifiable_target: Yes. 32% of wastewater treatment by 2050 will be done through activated sludge treatment.
has_binding_mechanism: No. This is a municipal sectoral target in the PCET; a binding mechanism is not explicitly stated.
has_spatial_specificity: Yes. Applies to wastewater treatment within the City of Dakar scope.
extraction_rationale: Explicit quantified target for wastewater treatment modality—meets QUANTIFIABLE TARGET and SPECIFIC INTERVENTION (activated sludge treatment) criteria.
weak_signals: "targets" (aspirational wording), no stated legal/regulatory mandate, missing baseline/interim targets

policy_statement: The City of Dakar seeks to increase mass-transport modal share to achieve 20% BRT and 15% TER usage by 2050 as part of a low‑carbon transport strategy.
verbatim_text:
The reduction targets for each of the major sources  of  transportation  emissions  and urban resilience due to the strengthening of the TOD are:
- increase the modal shares of the BRT to 20% and the TER to 15% by 2050;
has_quantifiable_target: Yes. Increase modal share of BRT to 20% and TER to 15% by 2050.
has_binding_mechanism: No. Targets are included in the PCET; the transport system is managed by CETUD and national actors, so city influence is collaborative rather than a standalone legal mandate in the quoted text.
has_spatial_specificity: Yes. City/metropolitan transport (Dakar / Dakar metropolitan area).
extraction_rationale: Transport-sector quantified modal-share targets for mass transit (BRT and TER)—meets QUANTIFIABLE TARGET and SPECIFIC INTERVENTION (promote BRT/TER) criteria.
weak_signals: "seeks to" (aspirational), no baseline provided, no interim milestones, no legal/regulatory mandate cited, lack of implementation/funding detail
strong_signals: "20% BRT", "15% TER", "by 2050" (timeline), Dakar / metropolitan area (spatial specificity), explicit modal-share targets (technological/behavioral shift)

policy_statement: Adopt and enforce energy efficiency standards (building code) to improve the energy performance of new buildings in Dakar.
verbatim_text: Adoption of energy efficiency standards (building code) to improve the energy performance of new buildings
has_quantifiable_target: No numeric target is in this specific line (it is a regulatory action), though other sections include related quantified goals (e.g., % LEDs, energy savings).
has_timeline: No explicit year in the quoted line; it is listed among priority actions for implementation within the PCET (Five‑Year Action Plan context).
has_binding_mechanism: Yes. Adoption of 'energy efficiency standards (building code)' implies a regulatory/binding mechanism (building code enforcement) to improve energy performance of new buildings.
has_spatial_specificity: Yes. Applies to new buildings in the City of Dakar (municipal jurisdiction over urban planning/building standards).
extraction_rationale: Explicit policy action: adoption of energy efficiency standards (building code) appears as a named action in the plan—meets SPECIFIC INTERVENTION and (potentially) BINDING MECHANISM criteria because building codes are regulatory.
weak_signals: "improve" (vague outcome); no numeric target; no deadline/timeline; baseline not stated; enforcement details unspecified
strong_signals: "adopt and enforce"; "energy efficiency standards"; "building code"; "new buildings"; "Dakar" (spatial scope); regulatory/binding mechanism implied
